name: Tamura's Fine Wine & Liquors (Waialae)
tagline: The Kahala-area location of Oahu's best poke-inside-a-liquor-store situation — grab a bottle and a pound of spicy ahi, you've cracked the code.
parking: Strip mall lot on Waialae Ave
talkStory: The Waialae branch brings the Tamura family's famous poke counter and curated wine selection to the Kaimuki/Kahala side of town. Same family, same in-house preparations, same quality as the Kailua original. Regulars call ahead to check which preparations are available. The spicy ahi and furikake salmon are consistently top sellers. Best poke selection before 1pm — they make everything fresh daily and popular flavors sell out.
